summary: Job execution timeout during macOS build - the Node.js build process did not complete within the job timeout window, as indicated by case metadata and exit code 2.
root_cause: Build process exceeded job execution timeout

evidence.reason: Case metadata explicitly identifies this as an exec-timeout scenario
Exit code 2 indicates timeout or signal termination in CI systems
Last compilation command logged at 10:41:06; error occurs at 11:56:33 (~75 minute gap indicating prolonged execution or timeout
Large parallel build with strict error-on-warn flag can extend compilation duration significantly

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
